title: Taxonomy of AI Risks in Public Policy
description: A flowchart categorizing and connecting the primary risk domains associated with AI, from their origins to their societal impacts, to guide ethical policy considerations.
elements: Societal Risks (e.g., Misinformation, Erosion of Trust)
Existential & Long-term Risks (e.g., Loss of Control, Value Alignment)
relationships: Technical failures can lead to Operational hazards
Operational and Societal risks can amplify each other
Unmitigated Societal risks can contribute to Existential threats
All categories inform necessary Policy Responses (e.g., Regulation, Oversight, Auditing)
